properties.name: 1st Territorial Defence Brigade "Ivan Bohun"
properties.description:
1st Territorial Brigade Ivan Bohun. Note their battalions seem to operate separately

515th Battalion (Linearised to 1st)
516th Battalion  (Linearised to 2nd)
517th Haidamaki Battalion (Linearised to 3rd)
518th Wild Field/Dyke Pole battalion (Disbanded Feb 2024 and reinstated later in 2024 - https://twitter.com/Militarylandnet/status/1754947788868071926)

Reduced to TDF Brigade as of May 2024 https://militaryland.net/news/bohun-brigade-joins-to-territorial-defense/

https://militaryland.net/news/bohun-brigade-became-a-territorial-unit/

properties.name: 59th Assault Brigade
properties.description:
Had RUG Humvee group until late 2024 when it moved to 47th Mech

9th, 10th and 11th Motorized Infantry Battalions
Gained 108th Mechanized Battalion Da Vincis Wolves in Feb 2024

70th Rifle Battalion joined 59th Motorized Brigade as their 3rd Rifle Battalion as of August 2024 (https://www.facebook.com/groups/410995824683062)

Has Key Group, Baltica Group, Michigan group and Очі Відплати drones

Had Inquisition drones until mid 2024, when renamed Predators of the Heights

Was 59th Motorized Brigade but reformed into 59th Assault Brigade under Unmanned Systems in Jan 2025 https://militaryland.net/news/reform-of-the-59th-motorized-brigade/

properties.name: 63rd Mechanized Brigade
properties.description:
Has Kara and Moon Planet group drones

As of March 2024, consists of:
105th Battalion
106th Battalion
107th Battalion
51st Separate Rifle Battalion
52nd Separate Rifle Battalion
55th Separate Rifle Battalion

https://militaryland.net/army/63rd-mechanized-brigade-undergoes-structural-reorganization/ Changed to a more normal structure as of August 2025:

105th > 1st Mech Battalion
106th > 2nd Mech Battalion
107th > 3rd Mech Battalion
51st Rifle > Motorized Battalion
52nd Rifle > ?
55th Rifle > Rifle Battalion
Artillery divisions to Artillery group

properties.name: 67th Mechanized Brigade
properties.description:
Formation made from "Right Sector/Ukrainian Volunteer Corps" in late 2022

Composition: 
1st Assault Battalion
2nd Assault Battalion
2nd Mechanized Battalion 
3rd Mechanized Battalion
Tank Battalion
Combat Khrushchi Drone Group

Has 27th Rifle Battalion with them as of March 2024

General Info: https://militaryland.net/news/ukrainian-army-has-a-new-mechanized-brigade/

Da Vinci's Wolves personnel split in Jan 2024 for a new brigade, maintains the name though in 67th

Has Sky Walkers drones

properties.name: [UAV] Birds of Magyar / 414th Brigade
properties.description:
Drone group. Birds of Magyar officially got the designation 45th Special Tactical Aviation Group in early 2023 but continues to be known as Birds of Magyar

Was subordinate to 59th during early 2023, but as of June was with the Marine Corps until it became official in January 2024 as 414th Separate Battalion of Strike Unmanned Aviation Systems of the Marine Corps https://t.me/robert_magyar/782

https://t.me/robert_magyar/886 As of June 2024, becoming Regiment

As of December 2024, became Brigade

Doubling in size and adding deep attack component https://t.me/robert_magyar/1417 02/10/25

As of 2026, has at least 9 battalions including 2nd battalion Wormbusters, 9th battalion Kairos, Flying Skull etc

properties.name: 7th Tactical Aviation Brigade
properties.description:
Note that equipment numbers are notoriously spotty. Some airframes may belong to other squadrons now.

Equipment:
Two bomber squadrons of Su-24M (White 02, 06, 08, 12 [Crashed Fedorivka 08/05/22], 18, 20 [Potentially shot down 01/03/23], 21, 22, 26, 28, 41 [Destroyed 30/03/22], 44, 45, 46, 49 [Shot down Izium 22/03/22], 66, 77 [Shotdown Bucha 27/02/23] )

One reconnaissance squadron of Su-24MR (White 84 [Destroyed Snake Island 26/06/22] Potentially 40th Tactical Aviation Brigade)
(Yellow 11, 16, 17, 35, 36 [Potentially shot down March 22], 54, 59 [Shot down Poltava 12/10/22], 60, 93)

Nine other Su-24 destructions are recorded as of 07/08/23 but no markings as yet
